description_long: This is a large, rectangular office desk with a light wood grain finish and a sturdy, modern design. The front side features a central knee space flanked by two pedestal units: the left pedestal contains three drawers with round handles, while the right pedestal has a single-door cabinet and a smaller drawer above it. The top surface is flat and spacious, suitable for holding computers, paperwork, or office supplies. The sides and back are plain, with the wood grain pattern continuing throughout, and the desk sits on small, unobtrusive feet. The construction appears to be primarily engineered wood or laminate, giving it a clean and professional appearance. This desk is designed for practical use in work or study environments, offering ample storage and workspace.
description: A large, light wood grain office desk with multiple drawers and a cabinet, featuring a spacious flat top and sturdy construction.
description_view_0: The back view shows a plain panel with a central recessed section and no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_1: The left side view displays a solid wood grain panel with no visible features except the subtle texture.
description_view_2: The front view reveals three drawers on the left, a cabinet and drawer on the right, and a central open knee space.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing a solid wood grain panel with no additional features.
attribute_orientation: The side with drawers and a cabinet, featuring a central knee space, is intended to face the user as the front; the opposite side is plain and serves as the back.
attribute_usage_context: computer workstation or writing desk for office tasks
